name: @doodledood/manifest-dev-pi-tools
description: Pi tools package for manifest-dev: the /babysit-pr PR-lifecycle wrapper over Harness-level Do. Depends on @doodledood/manifest-dev-pi for the shared runtime.
comment_pi: No own `pi.extensions`: this package is loaded only from the repo-root pi.extensions (which lists ./packages/manifest-dev-pi-tools/pi/extensions/manifest-dev-tools.ts directly), never installed as a standalone Pi package. That keeps the core extension always present for the relative import and the verifier flags single-owned by core.
